path.description: Absolute path of the file containing the line.

column.description: 1-based byte offset of the regex match start within the line. 0 for non-match context entries.

type.description: Role of this line in the output: a regex match, a context line before a match, or a context line after a match. A line that is both a match and context for an adjacent match is emitted once with type='match'.

content.description: Text of the line, possibly truncated to max_line_bytes.

truncated.description: True when content was clipped to max_line_bytes.

matches.description: Match entries plus optional context lines, sorted by (path, line) ascending. Each line is emitted at most once per file.

truncated.description: True when the match cap (max_results) was reached and some matches were dropped.

total_files_searched.description: Number of files that were opened and scanned. Skipped files (binary, ignored, or outside allowed_paths) are not counted.

total_matches.description: Total number of regex matches across all files. Counts type=='match' entries only — context lines are not included.
